input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.5.2.6 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.5.2.6
            TITLE: if equipped, the engine drive sprocket cover may be used as part of the scatter shield system.

            CONTENT:
            rule T.5.2.6: If equipped, the engine drive sprocket cover may be used as part of the scatter shield system.
T.5.2.6 If equipped, the engine drive sprocket cover may be used as part of the scatter shield system.

final_answer: If equipped, the engine drive sprocket cover may be used as part of the scatter shield system.
